name: Very, Very Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. Mix together flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
3. Stir the mixture with a wire whisk and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, blend brown and white sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined.
5. Beat in butter until the mixture forms a grainy paste.
6. Add eggs and vanilla extract, mixing to form a light and fluffy batter.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture, chocolate chunks, and ground almonds to the bowl. Mix at low speed just until everything is incorporated; do not overmix.
8. Using an ice cream scoop, drop rounded portions of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart, or use a tablespoon to portion out the dough.
9. Bake for 20 minutes in the preheated oven.
10. Allow cookies to cool on a flat surface before serving.
